title: Mnemion tenellum

Overall, the classification of Mnemion tenellum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.

intro: Mnemion tenellum, also known as Mnemion, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including the treatment of various infections, fever reduction, and as an anti-inflammatory agent.
